                      Share lyrics for choir

                      Pick songs for each Mass section, then share a PIN-protected link.

                      Share choir practice

                      Anyone with the link can read these lyrics — no account needed.

                      Create a 6-digit PIN for your choir. Share the PIN separately from the link.

                          Theme 1 · Liturgy Flow
                          
                
                          Default deck theme: black background with amber #FFB800 highlights. Mass dividers follow the liturgical season. Mass Setup also offers Theme 2 (Midnight — all white on black) and Theme 3 (Paper — all black on white).
                          
              
                          
              Built-in · Theme 1
            
                          

            
                          
              Background#000000
              Highlight#FFB800
              Body text#F0FDF4
              DividerSeason
            
                          

            
                          Typography — fonts used inside this theme
                          
            
                            
              
                          • 
                
                
                            
                  Georgia Bold
                  
                            Section tags & kickers — e.g. “Liturgy of the Word”.
                            
                  
                            36–50 pt · amber highlight #FFB800
                            
                
                            
              
                            • 
              
                          • 
                
                
                            
                  Arial Regular / Bold
                  
                            Dialogue & readings — priest and assembly lines.
                            
                  
                            55–100 pt · off-white #F0FDF4
                            
                
                            
              
                            • 
              
                          • 
                
                
                            
                  Poppins Bold
                  
                            Hymn & lyric slides, set ALL CAPS on black.
                            
                  
                            66–75 pt · white / amber chorus
                            
                
                            
              
                            • 
              
                          • 
                
                
                            
                  Arial Black
                  
                            Emphasis — psalm response & collection total.
                            
                  
                            70–100 pt · off-white #F0FDF4
                            
                
                            
              
                            • 
            
                          
            
                          
          
                          
        
                          

        
                          
          
                          
            
                          
              
                          Live Slide Preview
                          
              
                          This simulated slide updates with the selected theme colors and font.
                          
            
                          
          
                          
          
                          
            
                          
              
                          Fourth Sunday of Advent
                          
              
                          Prepare the way of the Lord
                          
              
                          Live typography, color hierarchy, and accent treatment for generated worship slides.
                          
            
                          
            
                          Good Shepherd CommunityEntrance Hymn
                          
          
                          
        
                          

        
                          
          
                          
            
                          
              
                          Actual deck preview
                          
              
                          Renders your most recently generated PowerPoint to images so you can verify the exact colors and alignment of every slide — this is the real deck, not a simulation. Generate a Mass first, then refresh.

                                    Uses the celebrant from Mass Builder.                                     Off by default: PowerPoint and 16:9 poster only.
                                    
            
                                    
            
                                    
              
              
                                    Full-bleed Gospel art (requires OPENAI_API_KEY in .env).
                                    
            
                                    
            
                                    
              
              
                                    Same prompt as OpenAI; uses GEMINI_API_KEY from Settings (saved to .env.gemini).

              ZIP bundle

                                    Live preview
                                    
            
                                    Approximates typography and colors from your active Theme Lab selection.

                                    Parish community
                                    
                
                                    Gospel quote appears here.

                                    Song Library
                                    
          
                                    The full catalog lives on Song Library with search, liturgical sections, and inline edit. Use Edit below to jump there with the same song focused.
                                    
          
                                    
            
            
          
                                    
          
                                    
            Recently added (this browser)
            
                                    Nothing tracked yet — saving lyrics from Song Library adds entries here.
                                    
          
                                    
          
                                    
            
                                    
              
            
                                    
            
                                    
          
                                    
        
                                    
      
                                    

      
                                    
        
                                    
          
                                    Import slide theme from .pptx
                                    
          
                                    We sample the first slides for solid backgrounds, text colors, and fonts, then map them to the generator’s custom theme (closest practical match to your reference deck).

                                    Dashboard
                                    
                  
                                    Live platform stats and recent activity.
                                    
                
                                    
              
                                    
              
                                    
              
                                    Recent activity
                                    
              
                                      
              
                                      Quick actions
                                      
              
                                      
                
                
                
                
                
              
                                      
              
                                      
            
                                      

            
                                      
              
                                      
                
                                      
                  
                                      Analytics
                                      
                  
                                      Generations, signups, and parish activity (UTC).
                                      
                
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
                
                
                
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      Generations by day
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      Signups by day
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      Top parishes (period)
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
            
                                      

            
                                      
              
                                      
                
                                      
                  
                                      Parishes
                                      
                  
                                      Shared parish accounts — president plus up to 4 media team members.
                                      
                
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
                
                
              
                                      
              
                                      Create parish
                                      
              
                                      Manually add a parish and optionally assign yourself (or another user) so you can keep parish lyric versions separately from the global catalog.
                                      
              
                                      
                
                
                
                
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      Merge parishes
                                      
              
                                      Move members and references from a duplicate parish into the canonical record, then delete the source.
                                      
              
                                      
                
                →
                
                
              
                                      
              
                                      
            
                                      

            
                                      
              
                                      
                
                                      
                  
                                      Users
                                      
                  
                                      Accounts, parish linkage, presence, and location for language targeting.
                                      
                
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
                
                
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      
            
                                      

            
                                      
              
                                      
                
                                      
                  
                                      Membership requests
                                      
                  
                                      Approve parish memberships, songs, and priest names.
                                      
                
                                      
              
                                      
              
                                      Pending parish memberships
                                      
              
                                        
              
                                        Pending songs
                                        
              
                                          
              
                                          Pending priests
                                          
              
                                            
              
                                            
            
                                            

            
                                            
              
                                            
                
                                            
                  
                                            Account invites
                                            
                  
                                            Invite a new president (new parish) or add a president/media teammate to an approved parish.
                                            
                
                                            
              
                                            
              
                                            
                Invite type
                
                                            
                  
                  
                
                                            
              
                                            
              
                                            
                
                                            
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                                            Only approved parishes are listed.

                                              Song catalog
                                              
                  
                                              Global hymn library — shared across all parishes via Supabase.
                                              
                
                                              
              
                                              
              
                                              Add or edit lyrics in Song Library (superadmin saves publish directly). Use sync below to republish the catalog to Supabase if parishes are not seeing your latest changes.
                                              
              
                                              
              
                                              Sections
                                              
              
                                              
                
                                              Loading catalog status…

                                              USCCB / Bible readings stored locally per date.

                                              Projection templates
                                              
                  
                                              Import slide themes from reference PowerPoint decks.
                                              
                
                                              
              
                                              
              
                                              Opens the PPTX analyzer used to map deck colors and fonts into Theme Lab.

                                              Maintenance
                                              
                  
                                              Health checks and environment status (secrets never shown).
                                              
                
                                              
              
                                              
              
                                              
              
                                              Environment
                                              
              
                                                
              
                                                API probes
                                                
              
                                                On-demand route checks — status and latency only (no response bodies).
                                                
              
                                                
                
                                                Click Run API probes to test critical routes.

                                                Settings
                                                
                  
                                                Parish profile and app appearance
                                                
                
                                                
              
                                                
              
                                                
                
                  
                    
                  
                  Church Profile
                
                
                  
                    
                  
                  Parish Team
                
                
                  
                    
                  
                  Appearance & theme
                
              
                                                
            
                                                
          
                                                
          
                                                
            
                                                
            
                                                
              
                                                
                
                  
                
                
                                                
                  
                                                Church Profile
                                                
                  
                                                Community name, celebrants, and logo used across Mass media.
                                                
                
                                                
              
                                                
                
                                                
                
                                                
                  
                  
                                                
                    
                    
                                                
                      
                      
                      
                                                Parish name is locked after submission and cannot be changed.
                                                
                      
                                                Logo is locked after submission and cannot be changed.
                                                
                    
                                                
                  
                                                
                  
                                                
                    
                    
                  
                                                
                  
                                                
                
                                                
                
                                                
                  
                  
                                                Include these on generated Mass posters.
                                                
                  
                                                
                    
                    
                  
                                                
                
                                                
                
                                                
                  
                  
                                                Advanced toggles for debugging the generated deck.
                                                
                  
                                                
                    
                  
                                                
                
                                                
                
                
                                                
                  
                  
                                                Saved to the app database. Names appear in Mass Builder → Basics.
                                                
                  
                                                  
                  
                                                  
                    
                    
                  
                                                  
                
                                                  
                
                                                  
                  
                  
                
                                                  
                
                                                  
            
                                                  
            
                                                  
              
                                                  
                
                  
                
                
                                                  
                  
                                                  Parish Team
                                                  
                  
                                                  Invite media teammates to create an account and join your parish (parish name is set automatically).
                                                  
                
                                                  
              
                                                  
              
                                                  
              
                                                  Members
                                                  
              
                                                    
              
                                                    Invite media teammate
                                                    
              
                                                    
                
                
              
                                                    
              
                                                    
                
                
              
                                                    
              
                                                    
              
                                                    
                
                
                
              
                                                    
              
                                                    Pending invites
                                                    
              
                                                      
            
                                                      
            
                                                      
              
                                                      
                
                  
                
                
                                                      
                  
                                                      Appearance & theme
                                                      
                  
                                                      Light, Supabase-style dark, true-black OLED, or match your device.
                                                      
                
                                                      
              
                                                      
                
                                                      
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
                                                      

                
                                                      Header toggle dark mode
                                                      
                
                                                      When you use the sun/moon button in the top bar, which dark theme should it switch to?
                                                      
                
                                                      
                  
                  
                
                                                      

                
                                                      

                
                                                      Accent color
                                                      
                
                                                      App chrome follows the Verbum icon color by default. Liturgical green appears only on the Ordinary Time season pill in the header.
                                                      
                
                                                      
                  
                  
                
                                                      
                
                                                      
                  
                  
                  
                
                                                      

                
                                                      

                
                                                      Home news card
                                                      
                
                                                      Show world Catholic headlines beside the Sunday Gospel on Home. Refreshes each time you open Home.
                                                      
                
                
                

                
                                                      

                
                                                      Navigation tabs
                                                      
                
                                                      Home, Mass, Lyrics Library, and Media are always visible. Turn on optional tabs below to add them to your navigation — your choices are remembered for next time.
                                                      
                
                                                      

                
                                                      

                
                                                      
                  
                                                      Catholic Live Radio
                                                      
                  
                                                      Default station for the Live Radio pill in the header. Only stations with an in-browser stream can play from the mini player.
                                                      
                  
                                                      
                    
                    
                  
                                                      
                  
                                                      
                
                                                      

                
                                                      Use Mass Builder for hymns and exports, and Theme Lab for slide colors and typography.

                                                        Slide preview
                                                        
          
                                                        Organize slides on the left, preview on the right. Tap a slide row to jump in the preview.
                                                        
        
                                                        
        
      
                                                        
      
                                                        
        
                                                        Select a song with saved lyrics, then choose Preview.
